arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico is set to host a captivating Serie A encounter on Monday evening as struggling Roma welcome high-flying Atalanta. The contrast in form between the two sides couldn’t be starker, with Roma winless in their last five matches across all competitions, while Atalanta ride the wave of a seven-game winning streak in Serie A. The Giallorossi find themselves in unfamiliar territory, languishing in the bottom half of the Serie A table after their worst start to a season this century.
